title: Special Methods and Pythonic Object Behavior · Behavior Case: Oop Context Callable
summary: Make domain values readable, comparable, hashable, iterable, callable, and resource-safe only where meaningful. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop context callable increment in Pythonic domain and collection objects. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement context-manager or callable protocols when object lifetime or invocation genuinely matches those language roles.
Implement length, iteration, membership, indexing, and containment protocols with standard exception and performance behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
